blockingIssues.description: VAL-COL-002 is still unmet: there is no working way to add a skill to an existing collection from either Skill Detail or Central Skills. `SkillDetail.tsx` renders a dead `Add to collection` button, and `CentralSkillCard.tsx` still exposes only install controls.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny validation/reviewer procedure so Task-spawned `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` subagents can run with automatic execution approval in this worker environment, or document the manual-review fallback explicitly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In this collections scrutiny run, both Task invocations for `rust-collection-commands` and `collection-ui` exited immediately with `Exec ended early: insufficient permission to proceed`, so the validator had to complete both reviews manually after checking the handoffs, transcript skeletons, and commit diffs.
